scenarios.name: leaders manage series & roll; the occurrence index dedupes stamped sessions

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_attendance__series (id, title, kind, weekday, interval_weeks, start_time, location, notes, start_date, end_date, active, created_by, created_at) VALUES ('ser1', 'Tuesday practice', 'practice', 2, 1, '18:00', 'Field', '', '2026-08-04', '', 1, ?, '2026-08-01T00:00:00Z')

INSERT INTO app_attendance__series (id, title, kind, weekday, interval_weeks, start_time, location, notes, start_date, end_date, active, created_by, created_at) VALUES ('ser2', 'Sneaky series', 'practice', 3, 1, '', '', '', '2026-08-05', '', 1, ?, '2026-08-01T00:00:00Z')

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO app_attendance__events (id, title, kind, event_date, start_time, location, notes, series_id, created_by, created_at) VALUES ('ev1', 'Tuesday practice', 'practice', '2026-08-04', '18:00', 'Field', '', 'ser1', ?, '2026-08-01T00:00:00Z')

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO app_attendance__events (id, title, kind, event_date, start_time, location, notes, series_id, created_by, created_at) VALUES ('ev1-dup', 'Tuesday practice', 'practice', '2026-08-04', '18:00', 'Field', '', 'ser1', ?, '2026-08-01T00:00:00Z')
SELECT id FROM app_attendance__events WHERE series_id = 'ser1'

INSERT INTO app_attendance__records (id, event_id, member_id, status, note, recorded_by, created_at) VALUES ('rec1', 'ev1', ?, 'present', '', ?, '2026-08-04T18:05:00Z') ON CONFLICT (event_id, member_id) DO UPDATE SET status = excluded.status, recorded_by = excluded.recorded_by

INSERT INTO app_attendance__records (id, event_id, member_id, status, note, recorded_by, created_at) VALUES ('rec2', 'ev1', ?, 'late', '', ?, '2026-08-04T18:20:00Z') ON CONFLICT (event_id, member_id) DO UPDATE SET status = excluded.status, recorded_by = excluded.recorded_by
SELECT status FROM app_attendance__records WHERE event_id = 'ev1'
